Review passed: per-definition seams (jsonSchemaFor/schemaFor) added to FieldTypeInterface and FieldItemBase with bit-identical legacy mapping; FieldTypeManager has matching public helpers using a private resolveItemClass() with null-safe fallbacks; FieldDefinition::toJsonSchema() delegates through manager when injected, falls back to private legacyJsonSchema() mirroring the prior match. Optional injection compromise is sound — sanctioned by WP brief's 'smallest approach that compiles' guidance, and production wiring is rightly deferred to WP02. Regression test exercises both manager-less and manager-driven paths plus cardinality wrapping for all 6 legacy field-type ids. 286 field tests green. Only owned files modified. No direct FieldTypeInterface implementers outside FieldItemBase. Carry-forward notes: (1) duplicated legacy mapping in FieldItemBase::jsonSchemaFor and FieldDefinition::legacyJsonSchema is intentional now but worth revisiting once production call sites thread the manager — legacy fallback may become dead code. (2) Deviation from brief's literal 'return static::jsonSchema()' snippet was correct: StringItem::jsonSchema returns ['type'=>'string','maxLength'=>255] but legacy emission is just ['type'=>'string'] — bit-identical regression contract took priority.

Review passed: EnumItem plugin self-contained per #[FieldType(id: 'enum')], 4 owned files + EnumFieldTypeException (justified addition). 314 tests / 479 assertions green. Auto-discovery, per-definition schemaFor/jsonSchemaFor, castToCase/hydrate, casesForEnumClass with LabeledCase opt-in, and 6-variant error taxonomy all covered. NFR-001 reflection memoization white-box verified; NFR-002 messages carry field name + enum FQCN; NFR-003 seven surfaces exercised; EC-5 empty enum emits well-formed schema. Static schema()/jsonSchema() throw to surface misuse loudly. Deferrals to WP03 (FieldTypeManager plumbing into EntityType/EntityMetadataReader/FieldDefinitionConstraintBuilder; storage-adapter calls to hydrate()) are consistent with WP02 owned_files boundary and T010 step 4 directive.
